mapper.sql: t.id, t.tenant_type, t.code, t.name, t.owner_id, t.parent_id, parent_t.code AS parent_group_code, t.expiration_date, t.status, t.created_by, t.created_at, t.updated_at

t.id AS tenantId, t.tenant_type AS tenantType, t.code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, t.owner_id AS tenantOwnerId, t.parent_id AS tenantParentId, parent_t.code AS tenantParentGroupCode, t.expiration_date AS tenantExpirationDate, t.status AS tenantStatus, t.created_by AS tenantCreatedBy, t.created_at AS tenantCreatedAt, t.updated_at AS tenantUpdatedAt,
tfm.id AS tenantFeatureModuleId, tfm.tenant_id AS tenantFeatureModuleTenantId, tfm.module_id AS tenantFeatureModuleModuleId, tfm.created_at AS tenantFeatureModuleCreatedAt,
fm.id AS featureModuleId, fm.code AS featureModuleCode, fm.name AS featureModuleName, fm.sort_order AS featureModuleSortOrder, fm.status AS featureModuleStatus
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.id = #{tenantId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code})) AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN tenant_feature_module tfm ON tfm.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN feature_module fm ON fm.id = tfm.module_id AND fm.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.id = #{tenantId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY fm.sort_order ASC, fm.id ASC, tfm.id ASC

SELECT
FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN tenant_feature_module tfm ON tfm.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN feature_module fm ON fm.id = tfm.module_id AND fm.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND TRIM(t.code) <> '' ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.code ASC, t.id ASC, fm.sort_order ASC, fm.id ASC

SELECT
FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN tenant_feature_module tfm ON tfm.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN feature_module fm ON fm.id = tfm.module_id AND fm.status = 'ACTIVE' INNER JOIN user_tenant_access uta ON uta.tenant_id = t.id INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = uta.user_id WHERE u.id = #{adminId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND TRIM(t.code) <> '' ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.code ASC, t.id ASC, fm.sort_order ASC, fm.id ASC

SELECT
FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN tenant_feature_module tfm ON tfm.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN feature_module fm ON fm.id = tfm.module_id AND fm.status = 'ACTIVE' INNER JOIN account_tenant_access ata ON ata.tenant_id = t.id INNER JOIN account a ON a.id = ata.account_id WHERE a.id = #{memberId} AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND TRIM(t.code) <> '' ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.code ASC, t.id ASC, fm.sort_order ASC, fm.id ASC

SELECT
FROM tenant t LEFT JOIN tenant parent_t ON parent_t.id = t.parent_id AND parent_t.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN tenant_feature_module tfm ON tfm.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN feature_module fm ON fm.id = tfm.module_id AND fm.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code})) OR UPPER(TRIM(parent_t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code})) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code})) AND t.tenant_type = 'GROUP' THEN 0 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(t.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code})) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, t.id ASC, fm.sort_order ASC, fm.id ASC

SELECT fm.id, fm.code, fm.name, fm.sort_order, fm.status FROM tenant_feature_module tfm INNER JOIN feature_module fm ON fm.id = tfm.module_id WHERE tfm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND fm.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY fm.sort_order ASC, fm.id ASC

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tenant_feature_module tfm INNER JOIN feature_module fm ON fm.id = tfm.module_id WHERE tfm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND fm.status = 'ACTIVE' AND UPPER(TRIM(fm.code)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{code})) )
